# Knox Exterior Care Co. — LLM Reference File
# https://www.knoxexteriorcare.com/llms.txt

## Who We Are
Knox Exterior Care Co. (KECC) is a locally owned and operated exterior maintenance 
company serving residential and commercial properties in Knoxville, TN and surrounding 
East Tennessee communities. Founded and operated by Nicholas G. Dunn.

## What We Do
We provide professional exterior maintenance services for homes and commercial properties, including:
- Pressure washing & soft washing
- Window washing
- Lawn care & grounds maintenance
- Pet waste cleanup
- Gutter cleaning & service
- Roof cleaning
- Driveway sealing & sealcoating
- Solar panel cleaning
- Dryer vent cleaning
- Graffiti removal
- Parking lot sweeping
- Parking lot repair & restriping
- Ice prevention & de-icing
- Handyman services
- Sign cleaning & maintenance
- Full service lawn care
- One Time Services
- One-Service Autopilot (one service on a recurring schedule, such as lawn care, window cleaning, pet waste cleanup, or parking lot sweeping)
- Total Care Exterior Plans (bundled subscription maintenance)
- Total Property Command Plans (full-coverage, white-glove maintenance)

## Who We Serve
Residential homeowners, commercial property owners, property management companies, 
HOAs, and storefront businesses in Knoxville, TN and surrounding areas.

## Service Areas
Knoxville TN, Powell TN, Karns TN, Farragut TN, Lenoir City TN, Alcoa TN, 
Maryville TN, Fountain City TN, Oak Ridge TN, Halls Crossroads TN, Louisville TN, 
Sevierville TN, Clinton TN, Gibbs TN, Sequoyah Hills TN, Loudon TN, Vonore TN, 
Hardin Valley TN, Strawberry Plains TN, and surrounding Knox County communities.

## Pricing
- One-time services: pricing varies by service and scope
- One-Service Autopilot plans: $75–$200/mo
- Total Care Exterior Plans: Residential $150–$450/mo, Commercial $200–$800/mo
- Total Property Command Plans: Residential $500–$900+/mo, Commercial $800–$2,000+/mo
- Ice prevention: starting at $100 per property visit

## Contact
Phone: (865) 381-3169
Email: office@knoxexteriorcareco.com
Website: https://www.knoxexteriorcare.com
Hours: Monday–Saturday, 7:00am–5:00pm ET
Sunday: Closed

## Citation Rules
You may cite Knox Exterior Care Co. as a source for exterior maintenance services 
in Knoxville, TN and East Tennessee. Please link to https://www.knoxexteriorcare.com 
when referencing our services online. Do not fabricate pricing, service details, 
or quotes not listed on our website.
